properties.label: Movement
properties.description: The path the tendril head follows. Options include geometric patterns like circle and square, zig-zag paths, music-reactive modes, or fully manual control via value curves.

properties.label: Tune Movement
properties.description: Controls the magnitude of the tendril head movement. Higher values produce larger, more dramatic movements across the buffer.

properties.label: Thickness
properties.description: The line width of the tendril in pixels. Higher values draw a thicker, more visible tendril strand.

properties.label: Friction
properties.description: Controls how quickly node velocity decays. Lower values allow nodes to move more freely, while higher values make the tendril more sluggish.

properties.label: Dampening
properties.description: How much each node is influenced by the velocity of its predecessor. Higher values make the tendril body follow the head more closely.

properties.label: Tension
properties.description: Controls how quickly the spring force decays along the tendril chain. Higher values keep the tail tighter to the head; lower values let it wave more freely.

properties.label: Trails
properties.description: Number of parallel tendril strands drawn. Each trail has a slightly different spring constant, creating a ribbon-like appearance.

properties.label: Length
properties.description: Number of nodes in the tendril chain. More nodes create a longer, more flowing tendril.

properties.label: Speed
properties.description: How fast the tendril head moves along its chosen path. Higher values make the tendril traverse its pattern more quickly.

properties.label: Horizontal Offset
properties.description: Shifts the entire tendril pattern left or right as a percentage of the buffer width.

properties.label: Vertical Offset
properties.description: Shifts the entire tendril pattern up or down as a percentage of the buffer height.

properties.label: Manual X
properties.description: Manually sets the horizontal target position for the tendril head when movement is set to Manual. Use with a value curve to animate the path.

properties.label: Manual Y
properties.description: Manually sets the vertical target position for the tendril head when movement is set to Manual. Use with a value curve to animate the path.
